Gov..,rnmcnt; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section l !0 of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 159 of 1988). the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend tho Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989. namely:-- !. (I) These rules muy be Clllled the Central Motor Vehicles (9th Amendment) Rules, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the 1st October, 20 J 4. 2. In the Central Motor Vchicle Rules. i 989 .in rule 96, in sub- rule (9) ,- (a) in clause (i), the word, letter and !1gure "and N3" shall be omitted; (b) fnr clauses (ii), (iii) and (iv), the following clauses shall be- substituted, namely:- ·'(ii) new models of M3 and N3 categories of vehicles manufactured on and after the ist April, 2015; (iii) existing models of 1\-13 and N3 categories of vehicles manufactured on and after the l~t Oc1obcr, 2015".
